heading: Designation of American Museum of Science and Energy
label: 7142a Designation of American Museum of Science and Energy
notes: CodificationSection was enacted as part of the Miscellaneous Appropriations Act, 2001, and also as part of the Consolidated Appropriations Act, 2001, and not as part of the Department of Energy Organization Act which comprises this chapter.

children.text: is designated as the “American Museum of Science and Energy”; and
shall be the official museum of science and energy of the United States.

children.heading: References
children.label: b References
children.text: Any reference in a law, map, regulation, document, paper, or other record of the United States to the Museum is deemed to be a reference to the “American Museum of Science and Energy”.

children.heading: Property of the United States
children.label: c Property of the United States

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The name “American Museum of Science and Energy” is declared the property of the United States.

children.heading: Use
children.label: 2 Use
children.text: The Museum shall have the sole right throughout the United States and its possessions to have and use the name “American Museum of Science and Energy”.

children.heading: Effect on other rights
children.label: 3 Effect on other rights
children.text: This subsection shall not be construed to conflict or interfere with established or vested rights.
